name: UU PDP Privacy Policy Review
description: Review privacy policies and data protection documents for compliance with UU No. 27/2022 (Indonesia's Personal Data Protection Law). Extracts mandatory disclosure fields and validates them against the 7 core UU PDP sections.

fields.name: data_controller_name
fields.description: Name of the data controller (pengendali data pribadi) — company or legal entity responsible for data processing

fields.name: data_controller_address
fields.description: Registered business address of data controller

fields.name: dpo_name
fields.description: Data Protection Officer (DPO / Pejabat Pelindungan Data) name, if appointed

fields.name: dpo_contact
fields.description: DPO contact email/phone (Pasal 53 UU PDP)

fields.name: policy_effective_date
fields.description: Date the policy takes effect

fields.name: policy_last_updated
fields.description: Last revision date

fields.name: categories_of_data_collected
fields.description: Types of personal data collected (e.g., name, NIK, email, phone, biometric, financial)

fields.name: sensitive_data_collected
fields.description: Specific/sensitive personal data (kesehatan, biometrik, data anak, data keuangan)

fields.name: purpose_of_processing
fields.description: Specific purposes for which data is processed (Pasal 16)

fields.name: legal_basis
fields.description: Legal basis for processing (consent / contract / legal obligation / legitimate interest / vital interest / public task) — Pasal 20

fields.name: consent_mechanism
fields.description: How consent is obtained (explicit opt-in, checkbox, signature, etc.) — Pasal 22

fields.name: consent_withdrawal_procedure
fields.description: How a data subject can withdraw consent (Pasal 9 right)

fields.name: data_retention_period
fields.description: How long data is retained (Pasal 30)

fields.name: data_subject_rights_listed
fields.description: Rights explicitly mentioned (information, access, correction, deletion, portability, withdrawal, object to automated decision) — Pasal 5-13

fields.name: third_party_sharing
fields.description: Third parties with whom data is shared (processors, partners, regulators)

fields.name: cross_border_transfer
fields.description: Whether data is transferred outside Indonesia and to which countries — Pasal 55-57

fields.name: cross_border_safeguards
fields.description: Safeguards for international transfer (adequacy / contractual clauses / binding rules)

fields.name: security_measures
fields.description: Technical and organizational security measures (encryption, access control, etc.) — Pasal 35

fields.name: breach_notification_procedure
fields.description: Procedure for notifying data breach within 3x24 hours — Pasal 46

fields.name: children_data_handling
fields.description: How children's data (under 18) is handled with parental consent — Pasal 25

fields.name: complaint_channel
fields.description: Channel for data subjects to file complaints (to controller or to Personal Data Protection Agency)

fields.name: automated_decision_making
fields.description: Whether automated decision-making / profiling is used and subject's right to object — Pasal 10

validation_rules.description: DPO must be appointed for public bodies, large-scale sensitive data processing, or systematic monitoring (Pasal 53). Flag if sensitive data is collected but no DPO contact provided.
Legal basis must be one of the 6 valid grounds in Pasal 20
Privacy policy must disclose all 7 core data subject rights (Pasal 5-13): information, access, correction, deletion, withdrawal, portability, object to automated processing
Data retention period must be specified — indefinite retention is not compliant (Pasal 30)
Breach notification must mention 3x24 jam / 72 hours timeline (Pasal 46 UU PDP)
If data is transferred outside Indonesia, safeguards must be documented (Pasal 56)
Policy must describe how to withdraw consent — Pasal 9 right
DPO contact should be an email or phone number
If children's data is collected, parental consent mechanism must be described (Pasal 25)
A complaint channel for data subjects must be disclosed

action_triggers.description: Mark document as UU PDP compliant when all validation rules pass
Auto-generate UU PDP compliance gap report for failed validations
Notify DPO about missing mandatory UU PDP disclosures
Flag high-risk finding: international transfer without adequate safeguards (Pasal 56 violation)

nl_prompt: Extract all UU PDP (Undang-Undang Pelindungan Data Pribadi No. 27/2022) disclosure fields from this privacy policy or data protection document. Identify the data controller, DPO contact, legal basis for processing, categories of data collected (including sensitive/specific data), purposes, retention period, data subject rights disclosed, third-party sharing, cross-border transfer arrangements and safeguards, security measures, breach notification procedures (must mention 3x24 jam timeline per Pasal 46), consent withdrawal mechanism, children's data handling (Pasal 25), and complaint channels. Flag any missing mandatory disclosures required by UU PDP Pasal 5-13 (data subject rights), Pasal 20 (lawful basis), Pasal 30 (retention), Pasal 46 (breach notification), and Pasal 53 (DPO appointment for large-scale sensitive processing). Return all values in the original language (Indonesian or English) as they appear in the document.
